title: Petco Earnings Miss Estimates in Q4, Comparable Sales Rise Y/Y
text: Petco Q4 Earnings Summary. Performance Overview: Petco Health and Wellness Company (WOOF) delivered mixed fourth-quarter fiscal 2024 results. The company posted break-even earnings per share in the fourth quarter of fiscal 2024, down from adjusted earnings of 2 cents in the prior year, missing analyst expectations. Revenue and Sales: Net sales declined 7.3% year-over-year to $1.55 billion, though comparable sales showed modest growth of 0.5%, slightly below the consensus estimate of 0.9% growth. Profitability Metrics: Gross profit decreased 2.8% despite an improvement in gross margin, which expanded 180 basis points to 38%. However, adjusted EBITDA contracted to $96.1 million from $105.3 million previously, with margins declining 10 basis points to 6.2%. Cash Position: The retailer ended the quarter with $165.8 million in cash and $1.11 billion in stockholders' equity. Operating cash flow declined to $177.7 million from $215.7 million year-over-year. Forward Outlook: Management projects low-single-digit sales declines for fiscal 2025, with adjusted EBITDA between $375-$390 million. The company expects 20-30 store closures during the year.
